🙏 Prayer Request
Support Our Mission

Financial Partnership

Invest in Gospel outreach, pastors, children, widows, churches, media, and ongoing Kingdom work.

Faithful Giving

Give clearly. Serve directly.

Choose a ministry area or give as led. Every gift helps carry the Gospel, strengthen pastors, care for children and widows, and support ongoing work in India.

"God loves a cheerful giver."

2 Corinthians 9:7

Your Giving At Work

Gospel care reaches real families.

$5,000

Crusade outreach for 2,000-3,000 people

$50

Monthly child sponsorship

$30

Monthly widow support

$5,000

One Gospel gathering

Crusade Sponsorship

Helps reach gatherings of 2,000-3,000 people through outreach meetings.

Sound and local setup

Ministry materials

Follow-up with churches

$3,000

For 200 pastors

Pastors' Conferences

Covers accommodation, food, travel, and training support for leaders.

Meals and lodging

Travel support

Teaching materials

$50

Per month

Child Sponsorship

Provides steady care, education, health support, and spiritual nurture.

Education support

Food and clothing

Prayer and care

$30

Per month

Widow Support

Supports a poor and elderly widow with practical care and dignity.

Monthly provision

Comfort and prayer

Community care

Any Gift

As the Lord leads

Give as Led

Supports urgent needs, church projects, media outreach, and field ministry.

Church projects

SPANDANA and TV ministry

Urgent field needs

Partner With Us

Your gift becomes Gospel work in the field.

Give toward a specific amount above, or contact us if you want your gift directed to the area of greatest current need.

✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh✦ Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM & 07:30 PM✦ Fasting Prayer: Every Friday 07:30 PM✦ Youth Meeting: Sunday 02:00 PM✦ Sunday School: Every Sunday during Worship Service✦ All Night Prayers: Last Friday 09:00 PM onwards✦ Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh
Savior's Heartbeat
Ministries · Est. 1976

Preaching and Preparing People for HIS Coming. Serving communities across India with the transforming love of Jesus Christ since 1976.

“God Holy Spirit may touch you and speak to your heart to fulfill the Savior's Heartbeat.”

📞304 620 1974☎+91 7399577999✉saviorsheartbeatin@gmail.com
📍Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India
